title: /trigger ChangeOrigin
description: Adds a command for players to change their origin, with a limit of 3. Features a 3 hour trial where changes are infinite when someone first joins.
body:
Inspired by @sylenthuntress's original ChangeOrigin datapack. This version is non-configurable but has a 3 hour trial with infinite changes when the player first joins the server.
## Features:
- A player has three origin changes that they can access with /trigger ChangeOrigin. These are infinite for the first 3 hours.
- When someone first joins the server, they are notified of their trial and the fact that they can do this.
- When the 3 hour trial ends, they are notified and have a button to get one last free change, to prevent players from getting stuck on an origin they don't like when the trial ends.

If you want to change anything, leave a message on the Discord and I'll tell you what needs to be edited in the data.
